message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 17:30 and should leave on friday
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from london kings cross
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 2 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve modern european food and should be in the expensive price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 20:00 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
